creator: geekounet@poildetroll.net
text:
Approving with my previous email address.

On 02/05/2012 18:50:22, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of multimedia/clive,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/167532 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/167532
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
